newsSinceJun6: No material news since June 6. Most recent items predate the window: June 1 announcement of a 20% Class B stock distribution (record date June 15, distribution ~June 29) and a May 27 $44.7M U.S. Army full-rate production order for TS-4549/T Radio Test Sets under a 2024 IDIQ with ~$145M funding remaining, plus ESOP-related shelf registrations. Today's -1.33% move is ordinary drift.

sources.label: Businesswire - Astronics Announces 20% Class B Stock Distribution (Jun 1, 2026)
Astronics IR - Production Order for TS-4549/T Radio Test Sets (May 27, 2026)
Simply Wall St - ATRO up after Army radio test order and ESOP filings

verdicts.rankRationale: Yesterday's verdict already moved ATRO down to reconcile the displayed-vs-adjusted rank gap; nothing material has emerged since June 6 and today's -1.33% is noise, so on this strict latent-AI screen the right call is hold with mild negative drift since the +47% YTD run is defense/aerospace-driven, not new evidence for the rugged-edge-compute adaptation pathway.
verdicts.bull: Astronics Test Systems keeps winning high-reliability test business (May 27 $44.7M Army radio test order, ~$145M IDIQ funding remaining), validating the test-and-power capability base that the latent edge-compute thesis rests on.
verdicts.neutral: The stock's strength is explained by core aerospace/defense execution and capital-structure housekeeping (Class B distribution, ESOP shelves); the AI-adjacent optionality remains speculative and unpriced in either direction, so the listing's medium-evidence rating stands.
verdicts.bear: A +47% YTD rerating with zero AI-specific design wins means the latent-AI option is now being carried at a richer base valuation, shrinking the asymmetric payoff this strict screen exists to capture.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: A concrete ruggedized edge-compute or high-reliability electronics design win tied to AI/defense compute programs, or Q2 earnings (late July) showing test-segment backlog acceleration.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Thesis stays latent: continued aerospace-cycle-driven rerating without AI-chain evidence leaves the name as a crowded mid-cap defense compounder with no residual alpha on this list.
